race.comment: WHAT A RUSH (3) is struggling to come up with a decent barrier. Came out quickly from the wide gate and was found wanting in the straight when seventh at this course and distance. Key jockey change and sure to be thereabouts. TELEGRAPH (2) jumped in class and appreciated the big weight drop when he sat on the speed for a game win over 1007m at this track. At his top for this and stays in the calculations. MOSGIEL DAISY (13) deep into the prep and her best form is on rain affected tracks. Ran on late when fourth over 1312m here last time out. Drops in weight and don't dismiss. BRAZEN BRANDO (14) fitter now and a win looks imminent. Sat on the good early speed and nailed late when second over 1005m at Tuncurry in weaker class. Sharp weight drop and has sound wet track credentials.
